The '''Mattri asteroid base''' was an [[asteroid base]] in the [[Mattri system/Legends|Mattri system]] that once served as a location for the headquarters of [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis's]] private, anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] resistance movement, dubbed [[Peregrine's Nest]].

{{Ast-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
When asked about the number of bases they had used [[Sena Leikvold Midanyl|Sena]] replied the current one was "Fourteenth..." "...That's if you count [[Womrik]] and the Mattri asteroid bases." However, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] later doubted the accuracy of those statements when he realized how permanent a structure Peregrine's Nest had become. There may never have, in fact, existed such a base as the one she spoke of, or even the location.
